creator: adamw@adamw.org
text:
On 3 Mar 2014, at 13:36, Mathieu Arnold wrote:
> So, the only thing you did was adding CONFLICTS, right ? Which port 
> needs
> that ? (just curious)

It was multimarkdown where I started with it. Eventually I started just 
kludging things to install binaries with new names. I'm sure there are 
other ports where CONFLICTS could become finer-grained.

# Adam
